resources.string: 1) Grant "display over other apps" permission. 2) Enable the Favilla accessibility service (silent, no audio — only reads on tap). 3) Start the bubble. Then: select text in any app → tap the crow → sent to fiam. If nothing is selected, a typing dialog appears. Double-tap the bubble to dismiss it.
Grant "Display over other apps" for Favilla first.
Favilla is watching. Tap crow → capture selection.
Reads the text you have selected in another app when you tap the Favilla bubble. No audio, no events subscribed, no background reads.
On-demand text selection reader for the floating bubble.
